message:
🐛 Fix spinner on return, sidebar duplicates, season scroll (#36)

* 🐛 Fix stream resolution errors, add download button, improve cast discovery

- Debrid: increase timeout from 30s to 90s, add progress callback with
  status/percentage, better error messages (shows actual debrid status)
- Shows: add download button (↓) next to play in stream picker — opens
  resolved Real-Debrid URL in browser for downloading
- Shows: show debrid status + progress % in snackbar during resolution
- Cast: try reusePort=false first (better for LG WebOS TV discovery on
  macOS), fall back to reusePort=true if bind fails
- Cast: extend scan timeout from 15s to 30s for slower devices

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix spinner on return, sidebar duplicates, season scroll

- Only show loading spinner on first load; subsequent reloads are silent
- Providers with no subcategories shown as flat link (no 'All X' child)
- Providers with subcategories: header click selects all channels + toggles
- Season tab scroll centers the selected chip in viewport

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
